title: VoltCharge PowerCore 20000mAh Portable Power Bank — USB-C PD 65W Fast Charging for iPhone, Android, MacBook, Camping Travel
bullets: 20000mAh high-capacity portable power bank charges iPhone 15 Pro Max 4.5 times, Samsung Galaxy S24 3.8 times, or MacBook Air once on a single charge
65W USB-C PD 3.0 fast charging output — charge your MacBook Pro to 50% in just 30 minutes, with simultaneous 3-device charging via USB-C + dual USB-A ports
IPX5 water-resistant with aircraft-grade aluminum chassis and drop-tested to MIL-STD-810G — built for camping, hiking, and travel adventures
TSA-approved 74Wh battery meets FAA carry-on regulations — LED percentage display shows exact remaining power at a glance
What's in the box: VoltCharge PowerCore 20000, USB-C to USB-C cable, travel pouch, quick start guide, and 18-month manufacturer warranty

clr.item_name: VoltCharge PowerCore 20000mAh Portable Power Bank — USB-C PD 65W Fast Charging for iPhone, Android, MacBook, Camping Travel
clr.product_description: The VoltCharge PowerCore delivers 20000mAh of portable power with 65W USB-C PD fast charging. Charge your MacBook Pro to 50% in just 30 minutes. IPX5 water-resistant with aircraft-grade aluminum chassis. TSA-approved for carry-on. Includes USB-C to USB-C cable and travel pouch.

btg.node_path: Cell Phones & Accessories > Accessories > Chargers & Power Adapters > Portable Power Banks

keywords: fast charging power bank usb c

charging_speed: How fast does it charge my MacBook?
capacity: How many phone charges do I get?
What is the real usable capacity?

reviews.text: Charges my MacBook Pro amazingly fast — 50% in 30 minutes with the PD output. Love the aluminum build.
Does it work on airplanes? I need it for international travel and layovers.
Is this waterproof? I want to use it camping near lakes and rivers.
How fast does it charge my iPhone 15? Looking for something quick.
Stopped working after 3 weeks. The USB-C port feels loose and cheap. Disappointing.
Can I charge my MacBook and iPhone at the same time? Works perfectly for that!
The LED display is nice but the power bank is heavier than expected. 450g is a lot.
Best portable charger I've owned. TSA friendly, fast charging, great build quality.
Misleading capacity — doesn't actually deliver 20000mAh to the device due to conversion loss.
Survived a 4-foot drop onto concrete. The aluminum really protects it.

competitor_qas.question: Can I charge two devices at the same time?
competitor_qas.answer: Yes, it supports simultaneous dual charging via USB-C and USB-A.

competitor_qas.question: Is this safe for airplane carry-on?
competitor_qas.answer: Yes, at 74Wh it's under the FAA 100Wh limit for carry-on lithium batteries.

modules.content: Q: Is it waterproof? A: Yes, IPX5 rated. Q: Airplane safe? A: Yes, 74Wh is under 100Wh FAA limit. Q: How fast? A: 65W PD charges MacBook to 50% in 30 min.
Capacity: 20000mAh / 74Wh | Output: 65W USB-C PD + 18W QC + 12W USB-A | Input: 65W USB-C | Weight: 450g | Dimensions: 6.3 x 3.1 x 0.9 in | Material: Aluminum Alloy | Cells: 4x 21700 Li-ion

videos.title: Stop struggling with dead batteries while camping — VoltCharge PowerCore 20000
videos.description: Tired of your phone dying mid-hike? Solve your power problem with 20000mAh of portable power. 65W PD charges your MacBook in minutes. Finally enjoy all-day power anywhere you go.

videos.title: VoltCharge PowerCore — product overview and features
videos.description: Check out the features of our 20000mAh portable power bank with 65W USB-C PD fast charging.
